description_long: This is a single right-handed glove made of dark brown leather, featuring a slightly glossy finish and subtle creases that suggest flexibility and wear. The glove has a long cuff that extends past the wrist, providing additional coverage and protection. Small, round metallic rivets or fasteners are visible on the knuckles and along the wrist area, adding both reinforcement and a decorative touch. The surface shows some faint, lighter markings, possibly from use or as part of the design, and the fingers are anatomically shaped with gentle curvature. The interior appears hollow, consistent with a wearable glove, and the opening is wide enough for a hand to be inserted. Overall, the glove has a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark brown leather glove with metallic rivets and a long cuff, featuring a slightly glossy, worn surface and anatomically shaped fingers.
description_view_0: The glove is seen from an angle showing the back of the hand and fingers, highlighting the metallic rivets and subtle surface markings.
description_view_1: This view displays the glove laid flat with the back fully visible, emphasizing the rivets on the knuckles and the length of the cuff.
description_view_2: The glove is viewed from the open cuff end, showing the hollow interior and the circular opening for hand insertion.
description_view_3: A side profile of the glove, revealing the smooth curvature of the fingers and the continuous, unbroken leather surface along the side.
